name: zorg_repeat
description: Invented 89-bp tandem repeat unit found in pericentromeric blocks of the (fictional) test_fictive genome. Arrays span hundreds of kilobases per chromosome. AT-biased monomer with a hypothetical CENP-Z binding motif at positions 30-46. Used purely as a tandem_repeat exemplar for the EXTENDING.md walkthrough.
sources: synthetic, no biological basis — see EXTENDING.md example.
